title: RNA flow additional data sets
author: Ietswaart, Robert
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Additional raw data files and mathematical derivations to accompany the publication in Mol. Cell. (2024) by Ietswaart, Smalec, Xu, et al: Genome-wide quantification of RNA flow across subcellular compartments reveals determinants of the mammalian transcript life cycle.
